DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2021 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BACK OF THE HOUSE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Back of the House, Inc.'s demurrer to the first amended complaint is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to file a timely opposition to the demurrer due to an error by its counsel. Under the circumstances, leave to amend is appropriate.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
